```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(sep = "\n", c(
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfDepartments, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR_own$numberOfDepartments),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfPatients, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR_own$numberOfPatients),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfAdmissions, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR_own$numberOfAdmissions),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$sumOfPatientDays, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR_own$sumOfPatientDays),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$averageSurveillancePeriod, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR_own$averageSurveillancePeriod, " days")
))
```
